title: Abu ul-Ala Shirazi
body: Abu ul-Ala Shirazi (died 1001) lived around the 10th century at the court of the Buyid emir 'Adud al-Dawla. He found that arsenic could cure malaria.
categories: All Wikipedia articles written in British English
